summary: Frontend code review completed for Obsidian Cinema new features: 'Suggest For Me' sidebar and Poster Tip popup dialog. This is an ELECTRON DESKTOP APP that cannot be fully UI-tested in a web browser due to isElectron() checks. Code review confirms all data-testid attributes present and logic is correctly implemented. Backend /api/ai/suggestions endpoint verified working.

notes: This is an Electron-only app - LocalLibraryPage returns 'Desktop Only Feature' when not in Electron
Full UI testing requires actual Electron environment - web browser mocking has localStorage race condition with React

passed_tests: Backend: AI suggestions correctly excludes selected movie from results
Backend: Response includes id, title, reason fields per suggestion
Code Review: 'Suggest For Me' button (data-testid='suggest-for-me-btn') at line 1093 - conditionally renders when movies.length > 1
Code Review: Sidebar overlay (data-testid='suggest-sidebar-overlay') at line 1955 - fixed position z-50 slide-in panel
Code Review: Sidebar loading state (data-testid='sidebar-loading') at line 1969
Code Review: Sidebar suggest button (data-testid='sidebar-suggest-btn') at line 1986
Code Review: Close sidebar button (data-testid='close-suggest-sidebar') at line 1963
Code Review: Suggestion cards show poster, title, year, rating, and reason (lines 2008-2018)
Code Review: Fetch Posters button (data-testid='fetch-posters-btn') at line 1072
Code Review: Poster tip checkbox (data-testid='skip-poster-tip-checkbox') at line 1938
Code Review: Poster tip continue button (data-testid='poster-tip-continue-btn') at line 1946
Code Review: Poster tip shows when skipPosterTip is false and Fetch Posters clicked (line 560-562)
Code Review: 'Don't show again' checkbox saves to localStorage (lines 568-570)
Code Review: Old inline naming banner removed - 'For best results' text only in AlertDialog popup (line 1921)
Frontend: No compilation errors - webpack compiled successfully
Frontend: Local Library page renders in Electron mock (shows 'Local Library' header)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present per requirements: suggest-for-me-btn, suggest-sidebar-overlay, sidebar-suggest-btn, sidebar-loading, close-suggest-sidebar, skip-poster-tip-checkbox, poster-tip-continue-btn
Suggest For Me button correctly conditioned on movies.length > 1 (line 1088)
fetchSidebarSuggestions function correctly picks random top-rated movie from most popular genre as seed (lines 484-546)
Sidebar suggestions correctly call BACKEND_API + '/ai/suggestions' endpoint (line 517)
Poster tip popup using AlertDialog component with proper state management
confirmPosterTip saves localStorage preference and calls fetchAllPosters (lines 567-575)
Suggestion cards properly display poster, title, year, rating, reason with correct conditional rendering

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review - all features correctly implemented, cannot fully UI test without Electron)

seed_data_creation: N/A - Electron app uses localStorage, web browser mocking not fully compatible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Obsidian Cinema is an ELECTRON DESKTOP APP. LocalLibraryPage checks isElectron() and returns 'Desktop Only Feature' for web. Full UI testing requires Electron environment. Code review confirms all new features are correctly implemented: 1) 'Suggest For Me' button opens collapsible sidebar with AI suggestions, 2) Poster tip moved from inline banner to AlertDialog popup with 'Don't show again' checkbox. Backend /api/ai/suggestions endpoint is verified working. All data-testid attributes are present.
electron_app_limitations: This app requires window.electronAPI with isElectron(), getMachineId(), getLicense(), getDrives() and other Electron IPC methods. Web browser testing can mock these but localStorage race conditions prevent full React state initialization with test data.
